original_text: Margin compression presents a notable operational risk. Operating margin contracted significantly from 40.86% in Q3 2024 (C020) to 19.77% in Q2 2025 (C006, K003), representing a decline of over 20 percentage points. Net margin similarly compressed from 36.66% in Q3 2024 (C022) to 20.74% in Q2 2025 (C008, K004). This compression could indicate increased competitive pressure, rising operational costs, or pricing challenges in the travel services market. The company maintains high R&D intensity at 19.70% of revenue in Q2 2025 ($610M R&D on $3,096M revenue) (C009, K005), which supports innovation but adds ongoing cost pressure. Severity: Medium-High.
revised_text: Margin compression presents a notable operational risk. Operating margin contracted significantly from 40.86% in Q3 2024 (C020) to 19.77% in Q2 2025 (C006), representing a decline of over 20 percentage points. Net margin similarly compressed from 36.66% in Q3 2024 (C022) to 20.74% in Q2 2025 (C008). This compression could indicate increased competitive pressure, rising operational costs, or pricing challenges in the travel services market. The company maintains high R&D intensity at 19.70% of revenue in Q2 2025 ($610M R&D on $3,096M revenue) (C009, C004, K005), which supports innovation but adds ongoing cost pressure. Severity: Medium-High.
changes_summary: Removed K003 citation for operating margin (C006 alone supports the 19.77% figure per checker direction). Removed K004 citation for net margin (C008 alone supports the 20.74% figure per checker direction). Added C004 to support the $3,096M revenue figure which was previously unsupported (Issue 4). Retained K005 for R&D intensity calculation as it is available in the provided calculation results and supports the 19.70% figure.
